name: Holactie the Creator of Light
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひかり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>創</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>造</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ホルアクティ
name_jp_tl: Horakhty the Creator God of Light
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 3 monsters whose original names are "Slifer the Sky Dragon", "Obelisk the Tormentor", and "The Winged Dragon of Ra". This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. The player that Special Summons this card wins the Duel.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 3 monsters whose original names are "Slifer the Sky Dragon", "Obelisk the Tormentor", and "The Winged Dragon of Ra". This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. The player that Special Summons this card wins the Duel.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition, Unclassified, Condition
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
